tweets.text: Ripple's CEO, Brad Garlinghouse, remains bullish on Bitcoin but critiques Michael Saylor's preferred-share funding model. He argues this 'financial engineering' has hurt crypto, emphasizing that true value stems from utility, not complex financial structures.

tweets.author: stevenausgbusapng.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Story on reddit about a college kid who took $10k of their parent's money to buy bitcoin. The mother knew, but the father didnt. Kid lost most of it.

Father was angry, but got his money back. Sold the kid's car. 🤣

tweets.text: The trend-following case is actually pretty clear here. #BTC outflows might drift toward alts, but does that capital really want to land in something more volatile with weaker fundamentals than what it just left? What do you think happens to Solana if Bitcoin keeps sliding?
